claim_excerpt: PhysioNet 2012 is a mortality-prediction challenge resource with a defined task setting.
required_evidence: Approved dataset citation
available_evidence: silva2012physionet is cited and resolved in the local bibliography
notes: This supports dataset context only; it is not project approval evidence.

claim_excerpt: MIMIC-III is deidentified and available to qualified researchers subject to training and a data-use agreement.
required_evidence: Approved dataset citation
available_evidence: johnson2016mimiciii is cited and resolved in the local bibliography
notes: Dataset-level controlled-access context does not establish this project's access or institutional approval.

claim_excerpt: Raw data snapshots and final processed artifacts are not tracked in the repository.
required_evidence: Repository audit
available_evidence: Chapter 4 and reproducibility data-lineage records
notes: Absence of tracked artifacts is not presented as evidence of absent access authorization.

claim_excerpt: Clean-checkout reproduction requires authorized data access.
required_evidence: Repository and dataset-access records
available_evidence: Chapter 4 states a conditional requirement; no project access record is claimed
notes: The statement does not assert that authorization was or was not obtained.

claim_excerpt: The study is retrospective and observational; no intervention is assigned by this study.
required_evidence: Thesis design and repository methods
available_evidence: Source-defined analysis design and Chapter 3
notes: No claim of prospective clinical research is made.

claim_excerpt: Rule-derived proxy labels are not chart-adjudicated diagnoses or validated phenotypes.
required_evidence: Chart-review or validation record to claim validation
available_evidence: Repository contains rule code and no chart-adjudication evidence
notes: Appropriately distinguishes proxy constructs from diagnoses.

claim_excerpt: The framework is not clinical validation treatment recommendation or deployment.
required_evidence: Prospective clinical validation safety and impact evidence to claim otherwise
available_evidence: Abstract and discussion explicitly deny those claims
notes: Hebrew abstract carries the same boundary.

claim_excerpt: Proxy rules are project-specific and lack complete qualified clinical review; voting is not clinical truth.
required_evidence: Qualified reviewer decision record and chart validation
available_evidence: Rule/code provenance plus documented absence of review record
notes: Qualified clinical review remains a submission input and future-work gate.

claim_excerpt: Project DAGs were not learned from data and require domain-specific validation.
required_evidence: Qualified clinical/causal review record to claim approval
available_evidence: Source code defines DAGs; Chapters 7 and 11 state the limitation
notes: Prompt material is treated as provenance rather than approval.

claim_excerpt: Matching sensitivity and permutation checks do not establish positivity identification clinical validity or lack of bias.
required_evidence: Dedicated diagnostics or validation evidence for stronger claims
available_evidence: Source and result records plus explicit negative language
notes: No privacy or fairness metric is implied by these checks.

claim_excerpt: LLM prompts are neither causal discovery nor clinical validation and do not provide authoritative clinical judgment.
required_evidence: Complete prompt-run and qualified human-review manifest to make stronger claim
available_evidence: Prompt artifacts and Chapter 11 provenance language
notes: External assistant figure decisions are not described as Codex ethics or clinical approval.

claim_excerpt: No prospective validation independent external clinical validation or formal transport analysis was performed.
required_evidence: Prospective/external validation study artifacts
available_evidence: Explicit limitations; no conflicting claim found
notes: No chart review is claimed anywhere in the thesis.

claim_excerpt: No dedicated fairness audit was performed and subgroup performance/effect stability remain untested.
required_evidence: Prespecified subgroup/fairness evaluation artifacts
available_evidence: Discussion limitation and no subgroup audit in results package
notes: Adjustment variables are not misrepresented as fairness validation.

claim_excerpt: The repository does not establish project-specific approval consent/waiver data-use agreement or governance determination.
required_evidence: Authoritative institutional approval consent data-use and governance records
available_evidence: No such records are present; explicit boundary added in Stage 5.4
notes: Repair: added exact evidence boundary; no approval status is inferred from silence.

claim_excerpt: The system is not suitable for patient-level clinical deployment or treatment recommendation in its current form.
required_evidence: Prospective safety workflow impact and human-factors evidence to claim readiness
available_evidence: Discussion and abstract state the boundary
notes: No deployment authorization is claimed.

claim_excerpt: Dataset access and governance conditions do not establish institutional approval consent basis or final governance wording.
required_evidence: Project-specific authoritative records
available_evidence: Appendix boundary and reproducibility provenance-gaps.csv
notes: Dataset access remains distinct from project approval.

claim_excerpt: The Hebrew abstract says proxy states are not chart-adjudicated diagnoses and the framework is not clinically validated or ready for use.
required_evidence: Rendering and semantic comparison with English abstract
available_evidence: Rendered Hebrew page i and Stage 5.1 abstract-equivalence audit
notes: Stage 5.4 added LTR isolation only; no factual content changed.

claim_excerpt: No external/prospective validation subgroup fairness safety impact or deployment evaluation was performed; authoritative ethics/governance documentation remains required.
required_evidence: Study and authoritative-record evidence
available_evidence: Conclusion language agrees with Chapter 11
notes: No institutional determination is invented.

claim_excerpt: MIMIC controlled access obligations are described as dataset context rather than project authorization.
required_evidence: Citation plus project records for any project-specific claim
available_evidence: Citation supports context; no project records are cited
notes: No revision needed because thesis does not collapse credentialing into IRB approval.

claim_excerpt: Historical machine paths are context not portable execution instructions or hardware evidence.
required_evidence: Path scan and provenance records
available_evidence: Source wording and reproducibility lineage; reader-facing path was generalized in Stage 5.4
notes: Repair removes an unnecessary machine-specific path from reader-facing prose.
